# Skill: Shared Pull Request Delivery

## Purpose
Orchestrate the delivery of changes via pull requests with integrated review reporting.

## When to Use
- When changes need review and approval before merging
- When generating automated review reports
- When committing and pushing changes to version control
- When creating or updating PRs with structured metadata

## Features
- Template-based review report generation
- Automated commit/push operations
- PR creation and updates
- Review comment publishing
- Role-based permission checks

## Approval Gate
Code review completion is required before merge.
